channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Xbox Shuts Down Ninja Theory Studio
item.description: Xbox is closing Ninja Theory, the studio behind Hellblade. Staff were informed during a call on Monday.

item.title: Treyarch Studio Head Retires After 22 Years
item.description: Mark Gordon, Treyarch's studio head since 2016, is retiring after 22 years with the studio. His departure marks a significant change for the Call of Duty franchise.

item.title: FBI Warns of Kali365 Security Threat
item.description: The FBI alerts users of Teams, Outlook, and OneDrive about Kali365, a hacking platform bypassing multifactor authentication. Users are urged to stay vigilant.

item.title: Final Fantasy Resonance Inspired by Classic Titles
item.description: Final Fantasy Resonance's creators discuss its inspiration from Final Fantasy V and VI, adapting Brave Exvius for a new RPG experience. The game promises a nostalgic return to turn-based combat.

item.title: Xbox Shutters South of Midnight Studio
item.description: Reports indicate Xbox has closed the South of Midnight studio, adding to concerns about several first-party developers facing closure. Double Fine and Ninja Theory are also mentioned.

item.title: Civilization 7 Update Addresses Player Feedback
item.description: Civilization 7's lengthy revitalization continues with a major update addressing player concerns after its troubled launch. New features are set to enhance gameplay.

item.title: Steam Next Fest Features New PC VR Demos
item.description: Steam Next Fest kicks off today, showcasing a variety of new PC VR demos available for players. The event runs until June 22.

item.title: Intel Mac Era Comes to a Close
item.description: Reflecting on 20 years of Intel Macs, Apple’s transition marks the end of an era. The shift highlights the evolution of Apple's hardware strategy.

item.title: Galaxy Z Fold 8 Features Stronger Display
item.description: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 'Wide' will reportedly have a stronger inner display than the 'Ultra', thanks to improved glass technology. This enhances durability and performance.

item.title: Xbox Project Helix May Launch Without Controller
item.description: Rumors suggest Xbox Project Helix could launch without a controller as Microsoft aims to cut costs. This could redefine user interaction with the platform.

item.title: Galaxy S25 Update Introduces Notification Highlights
item.description: Samsung's Galaxy S25 series receives a software update, adding Notification Highlights alongside the June security patch. The update expands to more regions soon.

item.title: Destiny 2 Sees Surge in Player Engagement
item.description: Destiny 2's latest update has significantly boosted player counts and earnings, marking its healthiest period in years. The game continues to evolve positively.

item.title: Fable Developer Discusses Game Delay
item.description: The Fable developer shares insights on the pros and cons of delaying the game to February 2027. Initial disappointment was expressed but potential benefits are highlighted.

item.title: Caltech Launches Massive Deep Space Telescope
item.description: Caltech unveils plans for the Deep Synoptic Array, a groundbreaking radio telescope that will be 100 times faster than existing models. This project aims to revolutionize deep space exploration.

item.title: Rare Ford Capri Emerges After 30 Years
item.description: A rare Ford Capri, stored since the 1990s, is finally revealed after three decades. This model is one of only 1,038 produced, making it a unique find.
